nasb.text: I will also rejoice in Jerusalem and be glad in My people; And there will no longer be heard in her The voice of weeping and the sound of crying.

esv.text: I will rejoice in Jerusalem and be glad in my people; no more shall be heard in it the sound of weeping and the cry of distress.

cnv.text: 我必因耶路撒冷快樂，因我的子民歡喜； 他們中間必不再聽到哭泣的聲音， 也不再聽到哀號的聲音。

ccb.text: 我必因耶路撒冷而欢喜， 因我的子民而快乐。 城里再听不见哭泣和哀号声。

csbs.text: 我要因耶路撒冷而快乐， 因我的子民而欢喜， 城中再也听不见哭泣的声音和哀叫的声音；
